title: Triton Partners Raises €5.5 Billion for Delayed Flagship Fund
summary: Triton Partners has raised €5.5 billion ($6.3 billion) for its new flagship fund, people familiar with the matter said, an important milestone after the European buyout firm’s ability to attract fresh money was marred by work culture controversies and a difficult fundraising environment.

title: Oil Supplies in Focus Ahead of Stock, Bond Open: Markets Wrap
summary: Oil dominated investor attention ahead of the reopening of trading Sunday night in New York after US strikes near Iran’s key export hub at Kharg Island heightened fears of disruptions to Middle East crude supplies.

title: US Reiterates Oil Reserve Release Spurred by Iran War Will Be an Exchange
summary: The US Energy Department reiterated Sunday that a planned 172-million-barrel release of oil from the country’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve would be structured as an exchange.

Wild Weather Halts Flights, Dumps Snow and Knocks Out Power
summary: Blizzards, wildfires and thunderstorms swirling toward the eastern US have knocked out power to thousands and grounded hundreds of flights across the Midwest.

title: Trump’s War Jolts Global Central Banks From Fed to ECB to BOJ
summary: Central banks from Washington to London to Jakarta are about to make their first assessments of economic damage after more than two weeks of conflict between the US and Iran.
